classes.reasoning: This document is a Protocol Deviation Log tracking deviations from the clinical study protocol across multiple sites, including categories, corrective actions, and regulatory reporting. It is a regulated TMF document that does not fit any more specific class.

summary: This is a quarterly Protocol Deviation Log covering January through March 2024, documenting six protocol deviations (DEV-007 to DEV-012) across multiple European clinical trial sites. The log tracks visit window violations, eligibility errors, consent issues, laboratory procedure deviations, and IMP storage excursions, along with their categorization, patient impact, corrective actions, and closure status.
references_to: Protocol v2.1 § not specified but references IMR review and central ECG reader requirements
